title: Lower Cook Inlet Buoy Goes Adrift
summary: The Lower Cook Inlet buoy onshore after going adrift on the morning of May 26, 2021. Photo Credit: Zech Bennett, C&C Diving and Salvage. The Lower Cook Inlet wave buoy is temporarily out of commission after going adrift early in the morning of May 26,2021. The buoy is expected to be replaced and bac...
